title: rosa elliptica subvar. angustata
intro: Rosa elliptica subvar. angustata, also known as the narrow-leafed rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa elliptica plant, which is a type of wild rose native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa elliptica subvar. angustata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
